content:
#improvement #claude-code

# card options

Added copy card-id and display metadata buttons. Both appear on card hover alongside the existing delete button.

- delete card (existing)
- display metadata (ⓘ button — toggles popup with id, created, updated, branch)
- copy card-id (⊞ button — copies to clipboard, flashes ✓)

Completed: 2026-03-27
